name: Fluffy Land's Girly Besties
description:
"Let's get going already! We got so much fun to do!"

Cheryl and Bay are both from project Fluffy Land by Good Smile. They both very good friends and have a very tight friendship with each other. The image is by the Official Fluffy Land.

Uwah, another duo? Animal Crossing music for... Obvious reasons. All feedback and criticism is welcomed.
creator: Dewpuddles
